entry.title: [ITENNIS] Without This Technical Element You CAN NOT Hit Kick Serves
entry.summary:
Improve Your Kick Serve and more with the Brand New SPIN PRO
GET 10% OFF 👇👇 topspinpro.com/spinpro/intuitivetennis
In today’s video, I explain the most important technical characteristics on the kick serve while demonstrating with the spin pro.

Subscribe to Intuitive Tennis Premium
https://intuitivetennis.com

In today’s video, Shamir plays Ismael a 4.0 lefty while I coach both players and commentate on the match.
